strengths: Strong distributed-systems and high-throughput backend background evidenced by low-latency microservices work handling millions of requests per second at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby
Recent hands-on exposure to agentic AI infrastructure including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Fintech-adjacent experience at RIDE Capital and Optilyz, with pricing optimization and investment-platform delivery using modern TypeScript/cloud stacks
concerns: No executive or engineering-leadership tenure — consistently titled Senior/Staff individual contributor with no documented track record of building or scaling engineering organizations
Agentic AI work is nascent and appears tooling-focused rather than production multi-agent systems operating in regulated, high-stakes financial environments
No evidence of board-level communication, technical roadmap ownership, hybrid-partner governance, or managing a team beyond individual contribution
response.justification: Bogdan is a skilled, versatile individual contributor with genuine distributed-systems depth and early-stage exposure to agentic tooling, but this CTO role demands demonstrated executive leadership — scaling teams, owning technical strategy at board level, and governing hybrid engineering models — none of which appear in his career history; the gap between his current seniority level and the requirements of this role is too wide to bridge without substantial leadership experience that is not present on this resume.
